'''nadhushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:siadenovirus|siadenovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:siadenovirus|siadenovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nadhushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædhishith|nædhishith]] || [[word:nædhishij|nædhishij]] || [[word:nædhishish|nædhishish]] || [[word:nædhishi|nædhishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhudhushuth|nadhudhushuth]] || [[word:nadhudhushuj|nadhudhushuj]] || [[word:nadhudhushush|nadhudhushush]] || [[word:nadhudhushu|nadhudhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhushuth|nadhushuth]] || [[word:nadhushuj|nadhushuj]] || [[word:nadhushush|nadhushush]] || [[word:nadhushu|nadhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhufshufth|nadhufshufth]] || [[word:nadhufshufj|nadhufshufj]] || [[word:nadhufshufsh|nadhufshufsh]] || [[word:nadhufshuf|nadhufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadhushuthu|nadhushuthu]] || [[word:nadhushuju|nadhushuju]] || [[word:nadhushushu|nadhushushu]] || [[word:nadhushuku|nadhushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadhushuth|nadhushuth]] || [[word:nadhushuj|nadhushuj]] || [[word:nadhushush|nadhushush]] || [[word:nadhushu|nadhushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadhushuthul|nadhushuthul]] || [[word:nadhushujul|nadhushujul]] || [[word:nadhushushul|nadhushushul]] || [[word:nadhushukul|nadhushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadhushuuthuthu|nadhushuuthuthu]] || [[word:nadhushuujuju|nadhushuujuju]] || [[word:nadhushuushushu|nadhushuushushu]] || [[word:nadhushuuku|nadhushuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadhushuthun|nadhushuthun]] || [[word:nadhushujun|nadhushujun]] || [[word:nadhushushun|nadhushushun]] || [[word:nadhushukun|nadhushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadhushuthuoro|nadhushuthuoro]] || [[word:nadhushujuoro|nadhushujuoro]] || [[word:nadhushushuoro|nadhushushuoro]] || [[word:nadhushukuoro|nadhushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
